== Notes for [[Item:Q85583|Q85583]] ==

Sergia Laenatis Plautilla n. en Roma hacia el año 15 AC. Hija de Gaius Laenas cc. Marcus Cocceia Nerva- + antes del 38 AC

http://www.lavistalab.com/trees/dekeyser/vft_indpage.php?idno=017568

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nerva

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F29409CB72F1EFBBE49822EF79916CD059
geni:6000000001511221493

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
